overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through Night City at dusk. The character navigates a foggy urban street lined with neon-lit industrial buildings, stops at a traffic intersection to wait for vehicles, and continues along the sidewalk under an elevated highway.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit commercial sidewalk beside industrial facility

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk next to a building with bright yellow neon signage

entered.detail: large industrial building with bright yellow neon strip lighting and warning signage
elevated highway structure with green neon accent lighting running along its length
large cylindrical industrial storage tanks visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a concrete sidewalk beside a massive industrial building illuminated by yellow neon lights. The atmosphere is hazy and overcast at dusk, with an elevated highway visible in the distance to the right. Sparse pedestrians walk in opposing directions along the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection approach with traffic control

events.description: approaching traffic light at intersection, vehicles visible on the road

agents.ego_description: slowing down and coming to a stop at the red traffic light at the intersection

entered.detail: traffic signal pole with red light illuminated at the crosswalk

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a wide urban intersection, slowing down as they reach the traffic light. The yellow neon building recedes to the left while the elevated highway overpass becomes more prominent on the right. The scene opens up to reveal the crosswalk and passing vehicles.

events.description: large military truck passes through the intersection from left to right
traffic light changes to green, pedestrians begin crossing the street

agents.ego_description: waiting at the traffic light for vehicles to pass before crossing the street

notable_agents.action: large military truck driving through the intersection

segments.scene_description: The character waits at the red light at the intersection as vehicles including a large military truck pass by. The yellow neon building is now distant to the left. After the light changes, pedestrians begin crossing while the character prepares to cross the asphalt crosswalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered sidewalk under elevated highway with corporate advertising

events.description: begins crossing the street at the crosswalk
passes under the elevated highway overpass with large Arasaka billboard visible ahead

agents.ego_description: crossing the street and continuing along the opposite sidewalk under the elevated highway

entered.detail: large digital billboard displaying Arasaka corporate advertisement mounted on the overpass

segments.scene_description: The character crosses the street and walks along the sidewalk under the elevated highway overpass. The yellow neon building is now adjacent on the left again. A large Arasaka billboard hangs from the overpass ahead as the character continues through the foggy neon-lit street.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a hazy urban corridor that transitions from a narrow industrial sidewalk to a wide city intersection and back into a sheltered underpass. It begins with the character walking beside a massive building illuminated by yellow neon lights under an overcast dusk sky, with an elevated highway looming in the distance. As the character approaches a wide intersection, the neon building recedes to the left and the scene opens up to reveal a crosswalk and passing traffic, including a large military truck. The camera then lingers at the red light before following the character across the asphalt as the signal changes and pedestrians begin to move. Finally, the path leads the character under the heavy concrete of the highway overpass, where a large Arasaka billboard hangs overhead and the yellow neon glow returns to the adjacent buildings amidst the fog.
